evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs lint and unit tests on every push, and integration + E2E on PR, keeping push feedback under 2 minutes
expected_patterns: npm test OR npm run test:ci
anti_patterns: running full E2E on every push
no conditional logic between push and PR

evals.prompt: Set up Playwright test sharding across 4 workers in GitHub Actions with merged HTML reports
anti_patterns: manual shard counting instead of ${{ matrix.shard }}

evals.prompt: Configure Playwright browser caching in GitHub Actions so browsers are not reinstalled on every run
anti_patterns: caching browser binaries without key hash

evals.prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that quarantines flaky tests with @flaky tag into a non-blocking job
anti_patterns: no distinction between stable and flaky

evals.prompt: Create a .gitlab-ci.yml pipeline with parallel E2E sharding using CI_NODE_INDEX and coverage reports
anti_patterns: hardcoded shard numbers instead of CI_NODE_INDEX

evals.prompt: Set up conditional test execution in GitHub Actions so E2E tests only run when src/ or playwright.config.ts changes
anti_patterns: running all tests regardless of file changes

evals.prompt: Configure GitHub Actions concurrency groups to cancel in-progress runs when a branch receives multiple pushes
anti_patterns: static group name without branch awareness

evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions quality gate for main branch that checks code coverage is above 80% and blocks merge if below threshold
expected_patterns: npx coverage-summary OR coverage report parsing
needs: [unit-tests, e2e-tests] OR requires passing tests

evals.prompt: Design a pipeline that publishes test results to a PR comment and uploads HTML reports as artifacts with 7-day retention
expected_patterns: dorny/test-reporter@v1 OR test result publishing action
name: Test Results OR html report
anti_patterns: test results not visible in PR

evals.prompt: Create a nightly scheduled pipeline that runs the full E2E suite, security scan (npm audit), accessibility audit (axe-core), and posts results to Slack on failure
expected_patterns: if: failure() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' OR similar condition
anti_patterns: security and a11y scans not included in nightly
Slack notifications on all runs instead of failures only
